author: akashchi
title: benchmark_app crashes with STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION on Windows in test_benchmark_app_no_warmup_flag[CPU-Python]
signature: benchmark_app returned non-zero exit status 3221225477|Flaky Test
key_errors: FAILED tests/smoke_tests/test_benchmark_app.py::test_benchmark_app_no_warmup_flag[CPU-Python] - subprocess.CalledProcessError: Command '('benchmark_app', ...)' returned non-zero exit status 3221225477.
Exit code 3221225477 = 0xC0000005 = Windows STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION (access violation crash).
benchmark_app completed all 11 steps including inference and stats dumping, crash occurred on process exit.
root_cause: benchmark_app.exe crashed with Windows STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION (exit code 0xC0000005) after completing all 11 inference steps successfully. The crash occurs during process teardown/cleanup, not during inference. This is a known intermittent crash in Windows benchmark_app likely due to heap corruption or use-after-free in C++ static destructors or TBB thread pool teardown. The PR being merged (#36843) is a CI Doctor configuration change and does not touch benchmark_app or the CPU plugin, making this a pre-existing flaky test unrelated to the PR changes.
reproduction_steps: Run: benchmark_app -i dog-224x224.bmp -m bvlcalexnet-12.onnx -d CPU -niter 1 -nireq 1 on Windows. The crash is intermittent and may not reproduce consistently.
recommended_actions: Re-run the failed job - the crash is transient and unrelated to the PR changes.
If the crash persists, investigate TBB thread pool teardown and static destructor ordering in benchmark_app on Windows.
Consider adding a known flaky test skip/xfail marker for this test variant on Windows.
prevention_strategies: Mark test_benchmark_app_no_warmup_flag[CPU-Python] as conditionally skipped or xfail on Windows if the access violation recurs. Alternatively, investigate root cause in TBB/CPU plugin teardown on Windows Release builds.
historical_context: Similar crash (test_benchmark_app_no_warmup_with_api_modes, same exit code 3221225477) observed on 2026-07-07 in run 28837974056 (PR #36738). Pattern signature_hash 058ea9d678d180f9.
